modelUsage.rawResponsePreview:
{
  "units": [
    {
      "unitId": "game-concept",
      "microKnowledgePoints": [
        {
          "microId": "micro-game-concept-001",
          "title": "游戏的定义",
          "summary": "游戏是基于规则的交互性系统，是自愿尝试克服不必要的挑战的人类活动。",
          "role": "definition",
          "assessmentValue": "context_only",
          "suggestedEvidenceAngles": ["definition_grasp"],
          "sourceAnchorId": "anchor-game-concept",
          "sourceSupport": "p-013引用简·麦格尼格尔和游戏定义，作为理解游戏化的背景。"
        },
        {
          "microId": "micro-game-concept-002",
          "title": "游戏化定义（德特丁）",
          "summary": "游戏化是在非游戏语境中使用游戏设计元素。",
          "role": "definition",
          "assessmentValue": "high",
          "suggestedEvidenceAngles": ["definition_grasp"],
          "sourceAnchorId": "anchor-game-concept",
          "sourceSupport": "p-014引用德特丁的经典定义。"
        },
        {
          "microId": "micro-game-concept-003",
          "title": "游戏化目的（韦巴赫）",
          "summary": "游戏化的关键在于以创造乐趣的方式服务现实目标。",
          "role": "definition",
          "assessmentValue": "medium",
          "suggestedEvidenceAngles": ["definition_grasp"],
          "sourceAnchorId": "anchor-game-concept",
          "sourceSupport": "p-014引用韦巴赫对游戏化目的的阐述。"
        },
        {
          "microId": "micro-game-concept-004",
          "title": "游戏化与持续性用户体验的关系",
          "summary": "游戏化方法能够成为构建持续性用户体验的重要策略，通过反馈、挑战与意义建构提升用户持续投入意愿。",
          "role": "relationship",
          "assessmentValue": "high",
          "suggestedEvidenceAngles": ["structure_mapping"],
          "sourceAnchorId": "anchor-game-concept",
          "sourceSupport": "p-017指出游戏化是构建持续性用户体验的策略。"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "unitId": "dmc-model",
      "microKnowledgePoints": [
        {
          "microId": "micro-dmc-model-001",
          "title": "DMC模型整体结构",
          "summary": "DMC模型是游戏化元素的金字塔分层结构，分为动力、机制、组件三层。",
          "role": "model_layer",
          "assessmentValue": "high",
          "suggestedEvidenceAngles": ["structure_mapping"],
          "sourceAnchorId": "anchor-dmc-model",
          "sourceSupport": "p-020提出DMC金字塔模型，分三层。"
        },
        {
          "microId": "micro-dmc-model-002",
          "title": "动力层（Dynamics）",
          "summary": "动力层界定系统整体体验，包括约束、情感、叙事、成长或进展关系。",
          "role": "model_layer",
          "assessmentValue": "high",
          "suggestedEvidenceAngles": ["structure_mapping"],
          "sourceAnchorId": "anchor-dmc-model",
          "sourceSupport": "p-020详细描述动力层内容。"
        },
        {
          "microId": "micro-dmc-model-003",
          "title": "机制层（Mechanics）",
          "summary": "机制层组织用户行为与推进参与的规则流程，如挑战、竞争、反馈、奖励等。",
          "role": "model_layer",
          "assessmentValue": "high",
          "suggestedEvidenceAngles": ["structure_mapping"],
          "sourceAnchorId": "anchor-dmc-model",
          "sourceSupport": "p-020详细描述机制层内容。"
        },
        {
          "microId": "micro-dmc-model-004",
          "title": "组件层（Components）",
          "summary": "组件层是用户直接感知和操作的具体功能，如成就、徽章、排行榜、点数等。",
          "role": "model_layer",
          "assessmentValue": "high",
          "suggestedEvidenceAngles": ["structure_mapping"],
          "sourceAnchorId": "anchor-dmc-model",
          "sourceSupport": "p-020详细描述组件层内容。"
        },
        {
          "microId": "micro-dmc-model-005",
          "title": "三层协同关系",
          "summary": "动力层规定方向，机制层构成操作循环，组件层落实为具体功能，三者协同实现游戏化设计。",
          "role": "relationship",
          "assessmentValue": "medium",
          "suggestedEvidenceAngles": ["structure_mapping"],
          "sourceAnchorId": "anchor-dmc-model",
          "sourceSupport": "p-020末尾说明三层关系。"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "unitId": "flow-interaction",
      "microKnowledgePoints": [
        {
          "microId": "micro-flow-interaction-001",
          "title": "心流定义与条件",
          "summary": "心流是个体能力与挑战动态平衡、目标清晰、反馈即时时的沉浸状态。",
          "role": "mechanism",
          "assessmentValue": "high",
          "suggestedEvidenceAngles": ["mechanism

{
  "units": [
    {
      "unitId": "game-concept",
      "microKnowledgePoints": [
        {
          "microId": "micro-game-001",
          "title": "游戏化的学术定义",
          "summary": "游戏化被界定为在非游戏语境中使用游戏设计元素。",
          "role": "definition",
          "assessmentValue": "high",
          "suggestedEvidenceAngles": ["definition_grasp"],
          "sourceAnchorId": "anchor-game-concept",
          "sourceSupport": "原文p-014引用了Deterding的界定，并指出该表述是后续研究最常引用的定义。"
        },
        {
          "microId": "micro-game-002",
          "title": "游戏化的核心理念",
          "summary": "游戏化的关键在于以创造乐趣的方式服务现实目标，使人们更愿意进入并持续活动。",
          "role": "definition",
          "assessmentValue": "high",
          "suggestedEvidenceAngles": ["definition_grasp"],
          "sourceAnchorId": "anchor-game-concept",
          "sourceSupport": "原文p-014引用Werbach的观点，强调创造乐趣服务现实目标。"
        },
        {
          "microId": "micro-game-003",
          "title": "持续性用户体验的定义",
          "summary": "持续性用户体验关注长期使用中的情感联结、习惯养成与意义建构，不仅包括阶段性目标的效率和过程，还包括认知、行为和情感联结。",
          "role": "definition",
          "assessmentValue": "medium",
          "suggestedEvidenceAngles": ["definition_grasp"],
          "sourceAnchorId": "anchor-game-concept",
          "sourceSupport": "原文p-017描述持续性用户体验设计的内涵，强调情感联结、习惯养成与意义建构。"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "unitId": "dmc-model",
      "microKnowledgePoints": [
        {
          "microId": "micro-dmc-001",
          "title": "DMC模型整体结构",
          "summary": "DMC金字塔模型将游戏化分为动力、机制、组件三个层次。",
          "role": "model_layer",
          "assessmentValue": "high",
          "suggestedEvidenceAngles": ["structure_mapping"],
          "sourceAnchorId": "anchor-dmc-model",
          "sourceSupport": "原文p-020描述了DMC模型的三层结构。"
        },
        {
          "microId": "micro-dmc-002",
          "title": "动力层定义与要素",
          "summary": "动力层回答用户最终体验到什么，包括约束、情感、叙事、成长或进展关系。",
          "role": "model_layer",
          "assessmentValue": "high",
          "suggestedEvidenceAngles": ["structure_mapping"],
          "sourceAnchorId": "anchor-dmc-model",
          "sourceSupport": "原文p-020列举了动力层的具体要素。"
        },
        {
          "microId": "micro-dmc-003",
          "title": "机制层定义与要素",
          "summary": "机制层是组织用户行为与推进参与的规则与流程，包括挑战、机会、竞争、合作、反馈、资源获取、奖励等。",
          "role": "model_layer",
          "assessmentValue": "high",
          "suggestedEvidenceAngles": ["structure_mapping"],
          "sourceAnchorId": "anchor-dmc-model",
          "sourceSupport": "原文p-020列举了机制层的要素。"
        },
        {
          "microId": "micro-dmc-004",
          "title": "组件层定义与要素",
          "summary": "组件层是用户最易感知的界面元素或功能模块，包括成就、徽章、排行榜、点数、任务、虚拟商品等。",
          "role": "model_layer",
          "assessmentValue": "high",
          "suggestedEvidenceAngles": ["structure_mapping"],
          "sourceAnchorId": "anchor-dmc-model",
          "sourceSupport": "原文p-020列举了组件层的要素。"
        },
        {
          "microId": "micro-dmc-005",
          "title": "三层之间的协同关系",
          "summary": "动力层规定体验目标与方向，机制层构成持续运转的操作循环，组件层将前两者落实为具体功能。",
          "role": "relationship",
          "assessmentValue": "medium",
          "suggestedEvidenceAngles": ["structure_mapping"],
          "sourceAnchorId": "anchor-dmc-model",
          "sourceSupport": "原文p-020最后一句描述了三层协同关系。"
        }
      ]
    },

      "unitId": "flow-interaction",
      "microKnowledgePoints": [
        {
          "microId": "micro-flow-001",
          "title": "心流理论",
          "summary": "当个体能力与挑战难度保持动态平衡，且具备清晰目标与即时反馈时，用户进入高度专注且愉悦的沉浸状态。",
          "role": "mechanism",

          "summary": "游戏是基于规则的交互性系统，是自愿尝试去克服的不必要的挑战，追求体验而非效率。",

        {
          "microId": "micro-game-concept-002",
          "title": "游戏化的定义（Deterding）",

          "role": "definition",
          "assessmentValue": "high",
          "suggestedEvidenceAngles": ["definition_grasp"],
